message:
fix(fwc/recovery): register template as a known subcommand for typo correction

Adds "template" to the canonical subcommand list in three fixture arrays
so the recovery/typo-correction logic recognizes it as valid and can
suggest it when users mistype similar command names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -963,6 +963,7 @@ mod tests {
             "ops",
             "schema",
             "examples",
+            "template",
             "doctor",
             "status",
             "budget",
@@ -1199,6 +1200,7 @@ mod tests {
